channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260313)
item.description:
What's New

refactor: per-direction translation settings & fix popup focus

  • Rename sections: 'Dịch & thay thế text' / 'Dịch & xem nghĩa' → 'Dịch sang ngôn ngữ đích' / 'Dịch sang ngôn ngữ nguồn'
  • Add per-direction options: replace, copy, show popup, auto-hide for each direction
  • Extract shared TranslationDirectionOptions component to eliminate duplicate UI code
  • Extract shared handleTranslationResult() in AppDelegate for reusable translation logic
  • Add new settings keys: translationShowPopup, translateToSourceReplaceOriginal, translateToSourceCopyToClipboard, translateToSourceShowPopup, translateToSourceAutoHideSeconds
  • Fix popup stealing focus: change NSWindow → NSPanel with .nonactivatingPanel
  • Update README.md to reflect new per-direction translation settings

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
